# sysf.io

> sysf.io is a Swiss sovereign-AI engineering studio. We fine-tune Apertus — Switzerland's fully open LLM from EPFL, ETH Zurich and CSCS — on a client's own documents and run it inside their infrastructure: on-premise, Swiss cloud, or fully air-gapped. Open weights the client's auditors can inspect, no US API in the loop, and the client owns the resulting model.

## What we do

- Fine-tune the open Apertus model on a client's own data (domain, terminology, tasks) — validated against a retrieval-only baseline with a published ablation on the client's evaluation set.
- Orchestrate agents, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and tools wired into the client's systems.
- Add evaluation and guardrails (safety, PII, quality) with agreed metrics, reported before go-live.
- Deploy sovereignly: on-premise, Swiss cloud, or confidential compute (AMD SEV-SNP / Intel TDX with remote attestation) — no US LLM API dependency, zero data egress.
- Operate the system: monitoring, iteration and maintenance under a support agreement.
- Model-agnostic by design: Apertus, Llama or Mistral — whichever wins on the client's evaluation set.

## Why it matters

- For regulated Swiss and EU organizations, sending confidential data to external AI APIs means months of legal review, DPAs and residual-risk sign-offs; most projects die at the pilot stage. Open weights running in-jurisdiction make most of that review unnecessary.
- The approach is proven in production: the Canton of Ticino runs a fine-tuned Apertus-8B translation service on its own infrastructure at 94% accuracy after fine-tuning.
- Open weights mean transparency, auditability, ownership and no vendor lock-in. Clients own the fine-tuned model and receive a documented handover — they can run the system independently.
- Compliant by design: built for Swiss FADP/nFADP and EU GDPR, with documentation supporting EU AI Act obligations.
- Apertus is natively multilingual: German, French, Italian and Romansh, including Swiss German.

## Pages

- [Home](https://sysf.io/): positioning, six pillars, ownership ("built to be fired"), how it works, FAQ.
- [Platform](https://sysf.io/platform/): the end-to-end pipeline, architecture, hardware sizing, compliance.
- [Concepts](https://sysf.io/concepts/): the engineering in depth — [small models](https://sysf.io/concepts/small-models/) (why task-tuned 4–8B models beat rented APIs on narrow regulated work, and where they lose), [quantization](https://sysf.io/concepts/quantization/) (bytes per weight, the 4-bit sweet spot, the 1–2 bit frontier, KV-cache sizing), [evaluation-first delivery](https://sysf.io/concepts/evaluation/) (client-built eval sets, the four-way base/RAG/fine-tune/both ablation, go/no-go gates, drift monitoring), [the sovereign runtime](https://sysf.io/concepts/sovereign-architecture/) (workstation / node / air-gapped deployment shapes, the small-first router escalating to a larger local model, verifiable zero egress), and [orchestration in production](https://sysf.io/concepts/orchestration/) (LangChain/LangGraph hardening for regulated work: explicit graphs, human-in-the-loop interrupts, RBAC, audit trails, PII-safe self-hosted tracing, MCP tool integration, framework-agnostic handover).
- [Industries](https://sysf.io/industries/): use cases for banking, healthcare, legal, government, insurance, manufacturing.
- [Worked example report](https://sysf.io/reports/finma-ablation/): a reproducible four-way ablation (base / +RAG / fine-tuned / both) of Apertus-8B on Swiss FINMA circular Q&A, scored deterministically on answer accuracy and exact Rz-citation. Fine-tuning + retrieval doubles the production bar (22.4% → 45.4%); demonstrates the evaluation method. Repo: https://github.com/chengmanov/apertus-finma-eval
- [Pricing](https://sysf.io/pricing/): engagement model (Pilot → Production → Air-gapped); every tier is sovereign; pricing scoped per engagement.
- [About](https://sysf.io/about/): mission, principles, honest comparison with sovereign platforms and US cloud APIs.
- [Contact](https://sysf.io/contact/): book a scoping call. Email hello@sysf.io.

## Engagement model

- Pilot — prove value on one use case (fine-tune + retrieval, evaluation report with ablation, production roadmap; runs in the client's environment or a dedicated single-tenant Swiss cloud under a DPA, with deletion or handover of all data and weights at project end).
- Production — the pilot hardened for daily use (agents, RAG, guardrails, deployment, monitoring, support & maintenance agreement).
- Air-gapped — fully on-prem / confidential compute, dedicated operations, complete compliance & audit documentation (model card, data lineage, DPA template, TOMs, EU AI Act risk-classification worksheet, evaluation report).
- Pricing is scoped per engagement — fixed-scope proposals, no open-ended time-and-materials. Contact: hello@sysf.io

## Reference

- Apertus (base model): https://ethz.ch/en/news-and-events/eth-news/news/2025/09/press-release-apertus-a-fully-open-transparent-multilingual-language-model.html
